title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Alex Hormozi uses AI across his businesses through a four-pillar framework: using proprietary data as a competitive advantage, prioritizing human voice and direction before AI implementation, structuring AI into separated workflows, and leveraging compound effects over time. The video highlights a critical operational mistake that Hormozi's team made, warranting intervention from his co-founder and CEO.
